hooks.command: (jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run test:run --silent) 2>&1 || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Project: Next.js 16.2.1 + React 19. AGENTS.md warning is in effect — read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing framework code. Tests run via npm run test:run (Vitest)."}}'
